title: baldellia repens subsp. repens
intro: Baldellia repens subsp. repens, also known as Least Bittercress, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the watercress family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have potential medicinal benefits in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Baldellia repens subsp. repens can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it has been used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
